summary: Comprehensive backend API testing for mobile app - All 33 tests passed (100% success rate). All endpoints the mobile app consumes are working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Principal login with valid credentials
POST /api/auth/login - Teacher login with valid credentials
POST /api/auth/login - Student login with valid credentials
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info with valid token (password not exposed)
GET /api/dashboard/principal - Returns principal stats with all expected fields
GET /api/dashboard/teacher - Returns teacher dashboard with classes and notices
GET /api/dashboard/student - Returns student dashboard with attendance, fees, results
Role-based dashboard authorization (teacher gets 403 on principal dashboard)
GET /api/departments - Returns list of all departments
GET /api/classes - Returns list of all classes
GET /api/students with page and limit params
GET /api/teachers - Returns list of all teachers
POST /api/results - Teacher adds a result with grade calculation
POST /api/notices - Teacher gets 403 (only principal can create)
seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed called to initialize demo data (principal, teacher, student, departments, classes)
